text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: This is a well-known and thoroughly documented book by Stewart N. Ethier and Thomas G. Kurtz, published by John Wiley & Sons. The title, authors, and publisher all match exactly; the year cited (2009) corresponds to a paperback reprint edition, while the original was published in 1986/2005. It is found on Wiley's official site, Semantic Scholar, Google Books, and numerous booksellers.
LINK: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/book/10.1002/9780470316658
